title: Edible Amethyst
description: A Small mod that creates a way to eat amethyst and amethyst-related food!
body:
# **Edible Amethyst - v1.1 Current**
_yes... the blurry icon is intentional..._

_Edible amethyst is a small mod used to create amethyst-related food for those cave dwellers who love munchin on rocks!_

===========================================================================

**Features:**
- Crystal Bread
- Crystal Glow Berries
- Crystal Sweet Berries
- Crystal Egg
- Pink Goop
- Goop-Dipped Amethyst
- Pink Amethyst


_I strongly recommend using JEI or EMI for better information on the crafting recipes_

**Note:**
_The 1.19.2 version will not be updated! the mod is built for 1.20.1 besides the orignal version and that will be the only 1.19 version to exists, sorry for any annoyance this may cause._

============================================================================


**WHY DOWNLOAD EDIBLE AMETHYST?**
It offers some variety to food and makes mining better as all you have to do is bring some small supplies and you'll be able to make food on the go!

**Future Plans:**
- Crystal Fusion Bench (food crafting table)
- Crystal Cookie
- More Food variants
- More types of amethyst for food varaiton (yellow amethyst, red amethyst ect.)

============================================================================

**Wanna play with this mod on a server?**
bisecthosting.com/novva
